title: Depth Studies
description: Three independent stereoscopic experiments: a cross-view pair, a red-cyan anaglyph, and a hidden-depth autostereogram.
creative_direction: Each image uses a different established stereo visual language while keeping the depth cue visible as a finished gallery asset.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Depth Studies
en.description: Three independent stereoscopic experiments: a cross-view pair, a red-cyan anaglyph, and a hidden-depth autostereogram.

zh-CN.title: 立体视差单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立立体视觉实验：左右视差、红蓝 3D 和隐藏深度图。
